Okay, so essentially dynamic product ads allow you to create retargeting ads that will retarget based on what they looked at on the website. This is really, really, really powerful stuff. ## [09:06 - 12:00]

and he was selling military stuff, like weaponry stuff. And obviously you cannot advertise that stuff on Facebook, right, it's a really, really good way to get your ad account shut down.
